case_title: TERRY COOPER ET AL VS. DAVID CHEEKS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO MAXINE COOPER ON 12/14/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-14-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF TERRY COOPER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S MAXINE COOPER AND BARBARA DELLEY ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
